headline: VLTO: Strong Fundamentals, but Growth Concerns Keep Outlook Balanced
summary: Veralto shows strong fundamentals and market positioning, but modest growth, competition, and volatility keep investors in a cautious wait-and-watch mode.

headline: Danaher (DHR) Q1 Earnings: What To Expect
summary: Diversified science and technology company Danaher (NYSE:DHR) will be reporting results this Tuesday before market open. Here’s what to expect.
